query: SELECT ta.id, ta.username, ta.syncStatus, ta.syncedDialogs, ta.lastSyncAt, COUNT(d.id) as dialogsInDb FROM telegram_accounts ta LEFT JOIN dialogs d ON d.accountId = ta.id GROUP BY ta.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LPssBLFuVbNm9U.root --database bdpiDWPftxaP5joCkvKLNw --execute SELECT ta.id, ta.username, ta.syncStatus, ta.syncedDialogs, ta.lastSyncAt, COUNT(d.id) as dialogsInDb FROM telegram_accounts ta LEFT JOIN dialogs d ON d.accountId = ta.id GROUP BY ta.id;
